final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: shop UI pack for Orbwalker
Primary request: production candidate UI component sheet for shop cards, offers, relic slots, reroll, treasure chest choice, and transaction states.
Subject: shop offer card frame, affordable state, unaffordable/disabled state, sold-out overlay, selected frame, relic offer frame, reroll button frame, treasure chest choice panel, small error feedback badge.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy shop UI chrome, mobile/touch readable.
Composition/framing: organized component sheet on neutral background, separated components with padding, no labels, no embedded text.
Lighting/mood: merchant shop warmth, clear states.
Color palette: dark stone, warm amber, antique gold, muted purple cloth, red disabled/error accents.
Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no casino imagery, no gore, no tiny illegible ornament.
